governance_question: What public evidence shows that an AI capability claim was contradicted by document-visible operational reality?
current_public_evidence: SEC order and press-release materials support that Delphia claimed AI and machine-learning use with client spending/social-media data when such data was not used in the investment process, with a USD 225,000 penalty.
management_or_policy_control_surface: documentation of capability claims; control testing; corrective-action record; complaint/remediation workflow
claim_ceiling_now: Reviewer-safe settled exemplar of capability-claim contradiction inside regulated finance.
forbidden_overread: Do not treat the order as judicial merits fact-finding, cross-sector prevalence evidence, or proof of generalized AI-finance deception.
next_stronger_public_source_needed: One second non-finance official contradiction route beyond the already-landed FTC DoNotPay package, or one public final-authority hidden-human document that changes the current accusation-stage ceiling.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Table 1C governance-control sidecar row for settled capability-misstatement evidence.
paper_thesis_use: Supports methods/results prose on how AI-claim contradictions become paper-safe only when exact authoritative text and claim/counterevidence pairing are visible.

governance_question: What public evidence shows inflationary AI branding or service-description claims beyond raw product marketing?
current_public_evidence: SEC order and press-release materials support that Global Predictions claimed expert AI-driven forecasts and first-regulated-AI-financial-advisor status, with a USD 175,000 penalty.
management_or_policy_control_surface: supplier claim substantiation; public-facing representation review; correction history; governance sign-off for capability branding
claim_ceiling_now: Reviewer-safe settled exemplar of branding/service-misstatement evidence with exact wording and sanction amount.
forbidden_overread: Do not generalize this row into a broader result about AI-advisor markets, ordinary startup hype, or procurement misrepresentation outside the captured SEC action family.
next_stronger_public_source_needed: One second non-finance official contradiction route beyond the already-landed FTC DoNotPay package, or one public final-authority hidden-human document that changes the current accusation-stage ceiling.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Table 1C companion row for branding-inflation versus capability-misstatement contrast.
paper_thesis_use: Supports a bounded article/thesis comparison showing that even within one settled authority family the contradiction can concern either backend capability claims or public-service branding claims.

governance_question: What public evidence shows hidden human labor behind a purportedly automated AI service before disposition-grade closure exists?
current_public_evidence: A DOJ charging-stage press release plus OCR-supported indictment text support allegations that Nate made false AI capability statements and relied on hidden human transaction processing.
management_or_policy_control_surface: disclosure of human fallback operations; escalation logging; supplier/workforce traceability; capability-claim review before investor/public statements
claim_ceiling_now: Reviewer-safe charging-stage comparator showing that human-as-AI allegations can be authoritative yet still posture-limited.
forbidden_overread: Do not present the Nate row as adjudicated fact, settled hidden-human prevalence evidence, or final proof that non-finance AI-washing is already document-grade.
next_stronger_public_source_needed: Later public disposition, judgment, consent decree, settlement, or regulator-order-style text; alternatively a clearer public exact-caption source that improves join safety without upgrading posture by itself.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Visible lower-posture row in Table 1C and a governance-control warning badge for hidden-human fallback disclosure.
paper_thesis_use: Supports limitations and thesis discussion of why concealed human-labor allegations need stronger public authority before they can be merged with settled AI-claim contradiction evidence.
